description: Product Description Ecenti Kids Leave in Lice Repellent Conditioner Spray 125ml Directions 1. Shake the bottle before use. 2. Spray the conditioner evenly on wet or dry hair. 3. Comb through the hair to ensure even distribution. 4. Do not rinse out, style as usual.
